subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! All praise be unto Thee for having ransomed me for the life of the worlds, and all praise be unto Thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی لک الحمد بما فدیتنی لحیوه العالمین و لک الحمد بما
subcodes.subjects: @sacrifice of the Manifestation of God redeems the world, @suffering and imprisonment, @living waters; water of life, @prayer for forgiveness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
